view.title: Validate explicit UC need #5
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for user-owned internal calendar bindings as share sources is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 5 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for user-owned internal calendar bindings as share sources is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided confirms that user-owned internal calendar bindings can be selected as share sources. Specifically, the evidence from the prior step 'uc-need-validate-1' shows that there is a calendar grant with the source type 'internal_user_calendar_binding', which indicates that the internal calendar can indeed be used as a share source. Additionally, the presence of the 'mySources' array includes an entry for an internal calendar binding, further supporting the requirement's fulfillment.
